ddls:
CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the destination */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the destination (e.g., US, UK, CA) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the destination (e.g., USD, GBP, CAD) */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the destination */,
  "min_order_value" REAL /* Minimum order value required for delivery to the destination */,
  "max_order_value" REAL /* Maximum order value for delivery to the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_options" (
  "delivery_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery option */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., Standard Shipping, Express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of delivery */,
  "free_shipping_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for free shipping */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery option */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the delivery option */,
  "cost_based_on_weight" INTEGER /* Whether the cost is based on the order weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_delivery_options" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "delivery_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery option */,
  "destination_cost" REAL /* Cost of delivery for the destination */,
  "destination_free_shipping_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for free shipping for the destination */,
  "handling_fee" REAL /* Handling fee for the destination and delivery option combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id", "delivery_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination for the order */,
  "delivery_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery option for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled') */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'paid', 'pending', 'failed') */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_delivery_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_option_id") REFERENCES delivery_options ("delivery_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Stock status of the product (e.g., 'in stock', 'out of stock', 'backorder') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_status" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current shipping status of the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the shipping status was last updated */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., 'UPS', 'FedEx', 'USPS') */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  "payment_gateway_response" TEXT /* Response from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_time" (
  "delivery_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery option */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the delivery option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_option_id")
)
